question: Implement a `Counter` class with an integer count. Overload both the prefix `++` and postfix `++` operators for this class to increment the counter value.

test_cases.input: Initial c1=5, then ++c1, then c2=c1++, then initial c3=10, then c4=++c3
test_cases.expected:
c1 initial: 5
c1 after prefix ++: 6
c1 after postfix ++ (assigned to c2): 7
c2 (value before increment): 6
c3 initial: 10
c3 after prefix ++ (assigned to c4): 11
c4 (value after increment): 11
